positive: A symmetrical, minimalist composition featuring stylized botanicals entangled with constellations and celestial geometric elements. Central subject is a stylized wreath of glowing nebula flowers and crescent moons, rendered in deep sapphire blues, vibrant emerald greens, and cosmic golds. The composition must maintain high contrast and clear silhouettes suitable for a single-color screen print or direct-to-garment application. The style should be modern esoteric illustration, combining Art Nouveau organic flow with precise, clean sacred geometry. Studio lighting, ultra-detailed, vector quality, high resolution, perfect symmetry, macro view.
